title: 根岸Sの後に・ふいんき？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara reflects on how much she enjoyed
racing in the Negishi Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wishing to put on the pressure, I propose
entering a higher-level race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is the G1 February Stakes... However,
Haru Urara is unaffected after hearing the name
and just starts talking about how cool it sounds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel uneasy about Haru Urara's prospects if she
stays so easygoing...
